hero.title: Unbreakable Power
hero.subtitle:
**CMSE – Cap-Bon Maintenance and Electrical Services** | Since **2000**

Experts in **energy solutions** since 2000, we provide **sales**, **installation**, and **maintenance** of diesel generators for **industrial and residential** sectors.

**Reliability**, **performance**, and **power continuity** are at the core of our commitments, with a wide range of equipment and spare parts tailored to all your needs.

about.title: About CMSE
about.desc: Founded in 2000 and based in Cap-Bon, CMSE is your trusted partner for high-performance energy solutions. We put our expertise at the service of your industrial operations' continuity.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.name: Name
contact.message: Example: Hello, I would like to request a quote for purchasing a new diesel generator, spare parts, or to schedule an installation & maintenance service...

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, we provide round-the-clock emergency support to ensure your operations never experience critical downtime.
faq.q2: Are you official Deep Sea Electronics representatives?
faq.a2: Yes, CMSE is the official legal representative and distributor for Deep Sea Electronics in Tunisia and North Africa.
faq.q3: Do you install both residential and industrial units?
faq.a3: Absolutely. We install and maintain everything from compact residential backup generators to massive industrial power solutions.
faq.a4: We sell industrial and domestic diesel generators, a variety of spare parts, as well as controllers and other Deep Sea Electronics (DSE) products.

cta.title: Experiencing a Power Failure?
cta.subtitle: Don't halt your operations. Get our industrial support team on-site immediately.

interventions.title: Our Interventions & Field Work
interventions.desc: Discover our on-site achievements and the quality of our industrial installations.
